input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A girl wearing a pink cardigan over a grey shirt and blue pants stands near a white door. She raises her right hand to wave at the camera. Large white text reading "DUCT TAPE BOOKMARK" appears overlaid across the center of the screen, partially obscuring her torso.</think><answer></answer>

Behind her, a black chair holds a stack of papers and a green container. [6-10] The scene changes to a high-angle view of a red cutting board on a dark table. Purple-handled scissors with black blades and a silver craft knife rest stationary on the board's upper left side. From [18-20], hands pull a tape strip from the roll, revealing a vibrant floral design with red, pink, and green flowers. Through [20-22], the strip is pulled further down, exposing more of the colorful pattern. As the cutting progresses, a large dark mass moves into the bottom foreground, increasingly obscuring the view of the hands and the tape, though the trimming action continues uninterrupted.

[56-66] Hands work on a red cutting board where the left hand stabilizes a floral duct tape strip. Purple scissors remain stationary on the dark table surface to the right of the board throughout the sequence.

[72-76] The right hand aligns and positions the black hole puncher over the end of the horizontal floral duct tape strip held by the left hand, with the craft knife and scissors remaining stationary nearby.

[78-80] Hands grip and press down on a large black hole puncher positioned over the end of a floral duct tape strip on a red cutting board, with purple scissors and a silver craft knife stationary to the right. compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A girl in a pink cardigan, grey shirt, and blue pants stands by a white door. She waves her right hand as white text "DUCT TAPE BOOKMARK" appears across the center. She lowers her arm, standing still with the text overlay remaining. [4-6] The shot cuts to a close-up of the girl's face without text; she smiles looking slightly left. Behind her, a black chair holds a stack of papers and a green container. [6-10] The scene changes to a high-angle view of a red cutting board on a dark table. Purple-handled scissors with black blades and a silver craft knife rest stationary on the board's upper left side.

At [16-18], hands grasp a roll of patterned duct tape on a red cutting board; the silver craft knife, clear plastic ring, and stickers are removed, and purple-handled scissors shift to the right edge. From [18-20], hands pull a tape strip from the roll, revealing a vibrant floral design with red, pink, and green flowers. Through [20-22], the strip is pulled further down, exposing more of the colorful pattern. By [22-24], a long strip of floral duct tape extends diagonally across the board, clearly displaying red and pink flowers with green leaves, while the purple scissors remain stationary on the right edge.

[24-26] A long strip of floral duct tape lies vertically on a red cutting board with its sticky white side facing upward and patterned side down; a hand holds the top edge steady while purple scissors rest on the right edge. [26-30] The hand folds the upper portion of the tape down, adhering the colorful patterned side to the exposed sticky surface below, and presses firmly to smooth the layers flat against the board. [30-32] A right hand positions a silver craft knife horizontally across the lower section of the tape strip while the left hand stabilizes it, preparing to trim the excess length with the blade resting on the patterned surface.

[32-38] A right hand maneuvers a silver craft knife horizontally across a strip of colorful floral duct tape featuring red and green designs on a red cutting board, actively cutting through the material while the left hand secures the tape firmly. Purple scissors sit on the table's right edge. [38-40] The silver craft knife lies on the table adjacent to the purple scissors as hands grasp the separated rectangular piece of floral duct tape, holding it above the red cutting board.

From [40-48], hands manipulate a rectangular strip of floral duct tape featuring red flowers and green leaves over a red cutting board. Initially, the right hand folds the top edge while the left supports the bottom, smoothing the material. The strip is then held vertically and rotated diagonally as the right hand adjusts sticky edges. Finally, the left hand stabilizes the tape on the board while the right hand uses a silver craft knife to trim the edge. Throughout the sequence, purple scissors and small colorful stickers remain stationary on the dark table surface to the right of the cutting board.

[12-14] The red cutting board scene continues with the purple scissors, silver craft knife, and patterned duct tape in their previous positions. A new object, a clear circular plastic ring or bracelet, has been placed on the bottom left corner of the board.

[14-16] The red cutting board scene persists with the scissors, knife, tape, and ring. Three small, colorful shapes, resembling stickers or cutouts in light blue, purple, and pink, appear near the bottom center edge of the board, positioned to the right of the clear plastic ring.

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: A young girl in a pink cardigan waves near a white door. The scene shifts to a red cutting board where purple scissors, a silver craft knife, and patterned duct tape are arranged. Hands manipulate these items, adding a clear ring and colorful cutouts. Later, hands fold a strip of floral duct tape onto itself, pressing it flat on the board while the scissors remain stationary nearby during the crafting process.

samples.output: <think>Hands continue manipulating a white tape loop and a floral duct tape strip over the red cutting board. The right hand adjusts the white loop's position relative to the floral piece held by the left hand. The black hole puncher and purple scissors remain stationary in the background on the dark table surface.</think><answer></answer>
